phrases.en: Pam settled into her favorite armchair after dinner.
phrases.zh: 晚饭后，帕姆窝进了她最喜欢的扶手椅里。

phrases.en: She unfolded the evening newspaper to the puzzle page.
phrases.zh: 她把晚报翻开到了字谜版面。

phrases.en: She picked up a sharp pencil and a soft eraser.
phrases.zh: 她拿起一支削尖的铅笔和一块软橡皮。

phrases.en: She read the first clue across very carefully.
phrases.zh: 她非常仔细地读了横向的第一条线索。

phrases.en: She counted the empty squares in that row.
phrases.zh: 她数了数那一行里空着的格子。

phrases.en: Then, she wrote the answer neatly into the grid.
phrases.zh: 然后，她把答案工整地填进了方格里。

phrases.en: She moved on to the clues going down.
phrases.zh: 她接着看了纵向的线索。

phrases.en: She paused and tapped the pencil against her chin.
phrases.zh: 她停了下来，用铅笔轻轻敲着下巴。

phrases.en: She erased one wrong word and brushed away the crumbs.
phrases.zh: 她擦掉了一个写错的词，并拂去了橡皮屑。

phrases.en: She filled in the last tricky square at last.
phrases.zh: 她终于填上了最后一个棘手的格子。

phrases.en: She checked every letter against the clues again.
phrases.zh: 她对照线索又核对了每一个字母。

phrases.en: Finally, she smiled and set the finished puzzle aside.
phrases.zh: 最后，她微笑着把做完的字谜放到了一边。
